[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / resetCamera

# Method: resetCamera()

```ts
resetCamera(): void;
```

Reset to the default auto camera behavior.

This clears any active explicit camera and returns view calculation to renderer-managed defaults.

## Returns

`void`

## Example
